action.reasoning: Observation: 14 iterations spent exploring TripoSR internals. Convention A matches get_spherical_cameras exactly (diff=0.000000) but direct renderer calls still crash due to bbox filtering mismatches when some rays miss the bounding box (65526 vs 65536). Analysis: The high-level TSR.render() works reliably for built-in cameras but doesn't accept custom poses. Since our custom rays are computed with the exact same formula as get_spherical_cameras, we can monkey-patch get_spherical_cameras to return our custom rays and call TSR.render(), leveraging its fully working scaffolding (proper chunking, compositing, and output formatting). Decision: Rewrite model.py with this monkey-patch strategy, save pretrained weights as baseline.pt, run a smoke test with test_monkeypatch.py to verify the approach works for one validation object, and if successful we will submit eval next iteration.
